creator: gamato@users.sf.net
text:
It used to work on 6.x, now it fails:

$ wmmemload
kvm_open: kvm_nlist: No such file or directory
kvm_open: kvm_nlist: No such file or directory
kvm_open: kvm_nlist: No such file or directory
error extracting symbols

How-To-Repeat: Just run the program as shown above.
